issues.detail: Download link provided without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Meeting prep across Contacts, Calendar, and Messages
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for AppleScript/osascript and custom MCP code, missing the iMCP bridge; treatment installs the Homebrew cask, configures the imcp mcpServers entry with --mcp, and walks through menu-bar permissions.

scenarios.name: Morning planning across Reminders, Calendar, and Weather
scenarios.rationale: Baseline cobbles together reminders-cli, ical exports, and a weather API; treatment activates the iMCP services from the menu bar, grants Calendar/Reminders/Location permissions, and wires the single mcpServers block into Claude Desktop.
